name: workbench
description: Portable agent workbench: research workflows, skill recommendations, session memory capture, and prompt translation.

interface.shortDescription: Portable research, memory, prompting, and skill-advice workflows.
interface.longDescription: A portable workbench for Codex and other coding agents: deep research reports, quick scans, installed-skill recommendations, prompt translation, and session memory capture. Codex loads these as bundled skills; other runtimes can expose their own adapters.
defaultPrompt: Run a quick research scan on this topic.
Recommend the best installed skill for this task.
Turn this feedback into a coding-agent prompt.
